items.title: 10 hurt in shooting at mall in Louisiana, suspect at large: Officials
items.description: Ten people have been hurt in a shooting at the Mall of Louisiana in Baton Rouge, officials said.

items.title: Iran live updates: Trump orders Navy to 'shoot,' 'kill' boats putting mines in strait
items.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

items.title: WATCH:  What does reclassification mean for marijuana users?
items.description: A new order moves marijuana from Schedule I to Schedule III, putting state-licensed medical marijuana in the same category as some pain medications, k...

items.title: WATCH:  1st look at 'The Cult of NatureBoy'
items.description: "GMA" shares a preview at the new Hulu docuseries following social media figure NatureBoy and his followers in search of utopia.

items.title: WATCH:  ‘GMA’ anchors get quizzed by kids
items.description: On Bring a Kid to Work Day, the children of “GMA” staffers put questions to the morning show’s anchors.
